strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
2x2 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | 24min

hypertrophy.reasoning: Horizontal press + KB swings + push press dominate anterior chain; build posterior balance without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 12 KB Swings, 9 Box Jumps, 6 DB Push Press, 300m Run. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, biceps.
